'''Drel''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of aquatic creatures that gasped when out of [[Water/Legends|water]].<ref name="Snare" />

==Behind the scenes==
The drel were first mentioned in ''[[The Paradise Snare]]'', a [[1997]] novel written by [[A. C. Crispin]] as the first book in [[The Han Solo Trilogy (hardcover)|''The Han Solo Trilogy'']].<ref name="Snare" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1stm}}
